headline: [PX14A6G] PEPSICO INC SEC Filing
summary: Friends Fiduciary Corporation, alongside several other organizations, has filed an exempt solicitation (Form PX14A6G) urging PepsiCo shareholders to vote FOR Proposal Number 5 at the upcoming Annual Shareholder Meeting on May 6, 2026. This proposal requests PepsiCo to publish a report detailing the effectiveness of its human rights standards across its direct, franchise, and value chain relationships, citing concerns over human rights abuses in supply chains and operations in high-risk areas. The filers argue that PepsiCo's current disclosures do not sufficiently demonstrate the effectiveness of its human rights policies, making it difficult for investors to assess governance quality and risk management.
label: neutral
